incident_codes.title: Signer continuity failure
incident_codes.fail_closed_reason: Governance signer continuity is not proven, so release or evidence trust cannot be accepted.
incident_codes.recommended_operator_action: Stop governed execution, compare the canonical DER public key fingerprint against the approved trust policy, and require human approval before rotating signer trust.
recovery_checklist: Confirm the signer ID and canonical DER fingerprint from trusted CI telemetry.
Verify no private key material is present in repository files or logs.
Update only public trust material through the governed trust-policy process.
Re-run production-readiness and signer continuity diagnostics.

incident_codes.title: Governance dependency graph drift
incident_codes.fail_closed_reason: Governance module boundaries changed or became ambiguous, so dependency enforcement cannot be trusted.
incident_codes.recommended_operator_action: Block release, inspect dependency graph changes, and require review from governance owners before accepting new imports.
recovery_checklist: Run dependency diagnostics and capture the graph hash.
Remove forbidden runtime or cross-domain imports.
Confirm no circular imports remain.
Re-run dependency validation and full governance regression tests.

incident_codes.title: Governance release integrity mismatch
incident_codes.fail_closed_reason: Release metadata no longer matches signed governance state or required release fields.
incident_codes.recommended_operator_action: Stop release, rebuild release integrity metadata through the canonical builder, and verify signatures before deployment.
recovery_checklist: Do not manually edit release metadata.
Regenerate metadata through canonical release integrity tooling.
Verify dependency graph, module versions, and signature continuity.
Record human approval before promotion.

incident_codes.title: Rollback validation failure
incident_codes.fail_closed_reason: Rollback target or previous release lineage is not explicitly authorized.
incident_codes.recommended_operator_action: Block rollback and require release-owner approval with a known previous release hash.
recovery_checklist: Identify the exact previous release hash.
Confirm the rollback target is approved by a human release owner.
Validate previous release metadata and audit lineage.
Run release integrity validation with the explicit rollback target.

incident_codes.title: Trust-policy fingerprint mismatch
incident_codes.fail_closed_reason: The trusted public signer material does not match the active release or evidence trust policy.
incident_codes.recommended_operator_action: Block signing and verification until the active public key fingerprint matches the governed trust policy.
recovery_checklist: Derive the public key fingerprint using canonical DER normalization.
Compare runtime fingerprint telemetry with the trust policy.
Rotate exposed keys before updating public trust material.
Re-run trust-policy and release integrity checks.

incident_codes.title: Telemetry hygiene violation
incident_codes.fail_closed_reason: Governance diagnostics may expose sensitive material, so telemetry cannot be published or trusted.
incident_codes.recommended_operator_action: Stop diagnostics publication, redact unsafe output, and investigate the source of sensitive data.
recovery_checklist: Preserve the unsafe artifact for restricted incident review only.
Remove secret-bearing fields from telemetry sources.
Rotate any exposed credentials or signing material.
Re-run hygiene scans and production-readiness validation.
